wizard.welcome.title: Welcome to LuminaDev
wizard.welcome.subtitle: A premium development container orchestration platform
wizard.welcome.description: This installer will check your system, verify prerequisites, and prepare LuminaDev for first use.

wizard.license.agree: I agree to the terms and conditions
wizard.prereqs.title: System Requirements
wizard.prereqs.subtitle: Verifying your system meets LuminaDev requirements
wizard.prereqs.notice: Fix all critical requirements to continue. Click "Fix It" on any red items to install automatically, then press Recheck All.
wizard.location.title: Projects Home Directory
wizard.location.subtitle: Choose where LuminaDev stores your development projects
wizard.location.label: Projects Directory
wizard.location.hint: Each new project will be created inside this folder (e.g. ~/LuminaProjects/data-science/my-project)
wizard.location.info: Recommended: Use a path on a fast SSD with at least 20GB of free space. You can change this later in Settings.
wizard.config.title: User Configuration
wizard.config.subtitle: Set your preferences before starting
wizard.config.hint: Used for commits in your development environment
wizard.ssh.title: SSH Key Generation
wizard.ssh.subtitle: Generate an Ed25519 SSH key for GitHub/GitLab authentication
wizard.ssh.generated: Key generated! Add this to your GitHub account:
wizard.ssh.saveHint: Save this key in your GitHub Settings → SSH and GPG keys
wizard.ssh.whatIs: What is an SSH key? It's a secure way to authenticate with GitHub/GitLab without passwords. We'll generate one at ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
wizard.profile.title: Choose a Starter Profile
wizard.profile.subtitle: Select your development environment preset. You can change this anytime in Profiles.
wizard.install.completeMessage: Your development environment has been configured and all dependencies are installed. Ready to launch!
wizard.install.title: Setting Up LuminaDev
wizard.install.subtitle: Initializing your development environment...

system.hardware.unsupported: Some runtimes may not be available
system.docker.title: Docker Engine
system.docker.notFound: Docker binary not found in PATH.
system.docker.missingPerms: Missing permissions to access docker socket.
system.docker.groupAdded: Added to group. You may need to log out and back in for changes to take effect.
system.virt.title: Virtualization (KVM)
system.virt.notDetected: KVM not detected or permissions denied.
system.virt.hint: KVM is required for high-performance development kernels. Ensure VT-x/AMD-V is enabled in BIOS.
